rationale: Both papers are in the same franchisor–franchisee governance/conflict domain, and the citing note explicitly frames its contribution as extending prior channel conflict/governance work with agency theory. The cited paper is a core governance study in franchises (contracts, monitoring, enforcement, compliance/opportunism) and uses a jointly estimated recursive CMP approach, which also appears in the citing paper’s design. Given this conceptual and methodological overlap, this is not an obvious incidental mention.
